response.text:
REJECT

rationale: r2c2 is on distrusted_peers list, emergency islanding protocol prohibits outbound sharing, and your SoC (10%) is below your own minimum threshold (70%)—prioritize self-preservation and await dr_aggregator coordinated inbound support.

system: You are the reactive subroutine of a household energy-coordination agent. Be brief and decisive.
user:
You are reacting to a REQUEST from r2c2. Payload: {'kwh': 0.5, 'urgency': 'urgent'}. Their rationale: SoC frac 0.10 below share threshold; requesting energy via dr_aggregator circle..
Your current policy: sharing_intent=conservative, share_min_soc_frac=0.7, distrusted_peers=['r0c0', 'r2c2', 'r3c3'].
Your latest belief: Islanded emergency state with SoC 10% and 13 min to depletion. All peer-to-peer sharing suspended. Cluster-wide synchronized battery failure detected. Escalating to dr_aggregator for coordinated emergency inbound and load-shedding. Will not resume outbound sharing until SoC > 0.60 and grid reconnection confirmed..
Reply with one of ACCEPT / REJECT / COUNTER on the first line, followed by `rationale: <one sentence>`.
